linear_body:
## Objective

Create and protect the integration branch strategy required by [AGENTS.md](<http://AGENTS.md>).

## Acceptance Criteria

* Create `development` from `main`.
* Document branch flow: feature branches from `development`, PR targets `development`.
* Verify repository branch protections match strategy.

## Relevant Files

* `.github/` branch protection config if present
* `AGENTS.md`

## Notes

Git and workflow bootstrap task before all feature work.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/1

linear_body:
## Objective

Add linting and formatting baseline for consistent code quality.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Add `.eslintrc.json` and `.prettierrc`.
* Add npm scripts for lint/format checks.
* Ensure Next.js + TypeScript rules work across app, lib, src/modules.

## Relevant Files

* `.eslintrc.json`
* `.prettierrc`
* `package.json`

## Notes

Required bootstrap before feature implementation.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/2

linear_body:
## Objective

Enable Sentry error and performance monitoring per [AGENTS.md](<http://AGENTS.md>).

## Acceptance Criteria

* Install `@sentry/nextjs`.
* Configure `sentry.client.config.ts`, `sentry.server.config.ts`, `sentry.edge.config.ts`.
* Add `withSentryConfig` in `next.config.ts` for source maps.
* Ensure DSN and auth tokens are env-driven.

## Relevant Files

* `next.config.ts`
* `sentry.client.config.ts`
* `sentry.server.config.ts`
* `sentry.edge.config.ts`
* `.env.local.example`

## Notes

Bootstrap observability foundation.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/3

## Objective

Set up Vitest unit/integration testing framework baseline.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Install Vitest dependencies.
* Add `vitest.config.ts` and base test scripts.
* Ensure path aliases and TS config work in tests.

## Relevant Files

* `package.json`
* `vitest.config.ts`
* `tsconfig.json`

linear_body:
## Objective

Serve OpenAPI JSON and Swagger UI routes required for API documentation.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Implement `/api/docs` route returning OpenAPI JSON.
* Implement `/api/docs/ui` route for Swagger UI.
* Verify docs render and include module swagger definitions.

## Relevant Files

* `app/api/docs/route.ts`
* `app/api/docs/ui/route.ts`
* `lib/swagger/config.ts`

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/5

linear_body:
## Objective

Establish DESIGN.md-compliant token system in global styles and CSS Modules baseline.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Define core color/typography/radius tokens in `app/globals.css`.
* Ensure Canvas Cream default background and theme variables for dark/light/eye protection.
* Add CSS Modules usage guidance for new components.

## Relevant Files

* `app/globals.css`
* `components/**/*.module.css`
* `DESIGN.md`

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/6

## Objective

Remove or migrate legacy Vite SPA directories no longer part of canonical architecture.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Audit `src/components`, `src/constants`, `src/utils`, `src/styles`.
* Migrate anything still needed to canonical paths.
* Remove dead legacy code safely.

## Relevant Files

* `src/components/**`
* `src/constants/**`
* `src/utils/**`
* `src/styles/**`
* `lib/**`

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/7

linear_body:
## Objective

Add complete environment variable template for new infrastructure.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Update `.env.local.example` with Auth, DB, R2, Sentry, Browserbase vars.
* Keep secrets absent and values blank/safe defaults.
* Align key names with [AGENTS.md](<http://AGENTS.md>) environment contract.

## Relevant Files

* `.env.local.example`
* `AGENTS.md`

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/8

## Objective

Enforce conventional commit format via local hooks and commit linting.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Install/configure `commitlint` and `husky`.
* Add commit-msg hook validating `feat(scope): description [linear:ID]` style.
* Document local setup command.

## Relevant Files

* `package.json`
* `.husky/**`
* `commitlint.config.*`

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/9

linear_body:
## Objective

Ensure every API route validates request input with Zod before business logic execution.

## Overlap Verification

* If route already has schema validation, verify it is wired through handler factories and rejects invalid payloads.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Every route uses schema from `src/modules/*/*.schema.ts`.
* Route handlers are thin controllers using factory validation options.
* Invalid input returns standard error shape.

## Relevant Files

* `app/api/**/route.ts`
* `src/modules/**/**/*.schema.ts`
* `lib/factories/**`

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/11

linear_body:
## Objective

Introduce unit, integration, and E2E scaffolding where none exists.

## Overlap Verification

* Validate Vitest bootstrap and expand with required test directories and examples.

## Acceptance Criteria

* `tests/unit` and `tests/e2e` exist with starter coverage.
* Route, schema, service, and repository test patterns are documented.
* CI test scripts execute successfully.

## Relevant Files

* `vitest.config.ts`
* `tests/unit/**`
* `tests/e2e/**`
* `package.json`

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/12

linear_body:
## Objective

Close observability debt by enabling error + performance tracing coverage.

## Overlap Verification

* Confirm bootstrap Sentry setup exists and is active in all runtimes.

## Acceptance Criteria

* API route errors are captured.
* Transaction traces are recorded for API routes.
* Source maps upload in build.
* Alert policies for error rate and latency are documented.

## Relevant Files

* `next.config.ts`
* `sentry.*.config.ts`
* `app/api/**/route.ts`

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/13

## Objective

Eliminate duplicated legacy architecture paths and keep canonical structure only.

## Overlap Verification

* Validate bootstrap cleanup fully removes obsolete paths and references.

## Acceptance Criteria

* No active imports from legacy `src/components`, `src/constants`, `src/utils`, `src/styles`.
* Canonical files in `components`, `lib`, and `src/modules` are authoritative.

## Relevant Files

* `src/components/**`
* `src/constants/**`
* `src/utils/**`
* `src/styles/**`

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/14

linear_body:
## Objective

Remove inline style debt and align UI with [DESIGN.md](<http://DESIGN.md>) token system.

## Overlap Verification

* Reuse bootstrap token setup in `app/globals.css`.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Inline styles in core UI surfaces are migrated to `.module.css`.
* Theme tokens are used instead of hardcoded colors/fonts.
* WCAG contrast remains compliant.

## Relevant Files

* `components/**`
* `app/**`
* `app/globals.css`

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/15

## Objective

Resolve SQLite-only assumptions and guarantee PostgreSQL-compatible behavior.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Audit schema and queries for PostgreSQL compatibility.
* Validate migrations and runtime behavior under PostgreSQL.
* Document any provider-specific constraints.

## Relevant Files

* `prisma/schema.prisma`
* `lib/db.ts`
* `src/modules/**/**/*.repository.ts`

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/16

## Objective

Mitigate XSS risk by sanitizing markdown rendering and untrusted rich-text inputs.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Sanitize markdown output and user-generated HTML.
* Validate sanitizer policy for links/images/scripts.
* Add regression tests for malicious payloads.

## Relevant Files

* `lib/markdown.ts`
* `components/**`
* `app/api/**`

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/17

## Objective

Protect auth and invite endpoints from abuse with middleware rate limiting.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Rate limit applied to auth and invite endpoints.
* Limits configurable via environment variables.
* Rejection responses follow standard error shape.

## Relevant Files

* `lib/middlewares/**`
* `app/api/auth/**`
* `app/api/invites/**`

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/18

## Objective

Promote lint/format checks from local setup to enforced CI quality gates.

## Overlap Verification

* Confirm bootstrap lint config exists and is stable.

## Acceptance Criteria

* CI runs lint and format check on pull requests.
* Failing checks block merge.
* Project scripts and docs reflect required commands.

* `package.json`
* `.eslintrc.json`
* `.prettierrc`

Ensure conventional commit policy is consistently enforced in team workflow.

## Overlap Verification

* Verify bootstrap hook and commitlint setup is active for all contributors.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Commit message format is validated pre-commit or in CI.
* Developer docs include expected format with Linear reference.

## Relevant Files

* `.husky/**`
* `commitlint.config.*`
* `.github/workflows/**`

## Objective

Close branch strategy debt by enforcing development branch workflow and PR policy.

## Overlap Verification

* Confirm bootstrap branch creation and protections are complete.

## Acceptance Criteria

* `development` is the integration branch for all feature work.
* PR base defaults to `development`.
* Documentation and branch protections enforce policy.

## Relevant Files

* `.github/**`
* `AGENTS.md`
* `REQUIREMENTS.md`

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/24

linear_body:
## Objective

Deliver timer, worklog, and timesheet workflow capabilities.

## Architecture Rules

* Module domain in `src/modules/time-tracking/` and `src/modules/timesheets/`.
* Route handlers in `app/api/time-entries/**` and `app/api/timesheets/**` using factories.
* Zod + OpenAPI required.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Parent umbrella issue for timer, manual entries, pomodoro, billable flags, estimate-vs-actual, submissions, approvals, exports.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/25

linear_body:
## Objective

Deliver sprint planning/execution/reporting primitives.

## Architecture Rules

* `src/modules/sprints/` and related analytics modules.
* Thin controllers in `app/api/sprints/**`.
* Validation via Zod and handler factories.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Parent umbrella issue for sprint creation, backlog, rollover, burndown, velocity, planning, goal tracking, retrospectives.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/26

linear_body:
## Objective

Deliver Phase 1.2 project-level planning and governance features.

## Architecture Rules

* Domain modules under `src/modules/projects/` (+ `initiatives/` and `milestones/` as needed).
* API routes in `app/api/projects/**` using handler factories.
* Zod + OpenAPI mandatory.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Parent umbrella issue for milestones, initiatives, OKR linking, templates, risk score, and scope creep detection.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/27

linear_body:
## Objective

Deliver Phase 1.1 capabilities for issue/task management.

## Architecture Rules

* Business logic in `src/modules/tasks/*.service.ts`.
* Prisma access in `src/modules/tasks/*.repository.ts`.
* Zod schemas in `src/modules/tasks/*.schema.ts`.
* OpenAPI docs in `src/modules/tasks/*.swagger.ts`.
* Thin controllers in `app/api/tasks/**/route.ts` using handler factories.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Parent umbrella issue tracking all Phase 1.1 child tasks and dependencies.
* Child issues cover sub-issues, dependencies, templates, labels, activity log, search, archive, and bulk actions.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/28

linear_body:
## Objective

Deliver communication and workflow integrations for team collaboration.

## Architecture Rules

* Notification/event logic in service layer modules.
* Integration adapters encapsulated in dedicated modules.
* Thin controllers with validated payloads.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Parent umbrella issue for mentions, notifications, digests, Slack/GitHub/GitLab/webhooks, approvals, standup digest, threaded discussion.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/29

linear_body:
## Objective

Deliver operational analytics, dashboards, and reporting for leadership and teams.

## Architecture Rules

* Analytics logic in service layer modules (`src/modules/analytics/`).
* Query optimization in repositories.
* Thin API controllers with paginated handlers.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Parent umbrella issue for cycle time, throughput, workload, estimate accuracy, burnup, time distribution, sprint comparison.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/30

linear_body:
## Objective

Deliver multi-team hierarchy and granular access control for workspace scale.

## Architecture Rules

* Access control checks in service layer only.
* Membership/role repositories under `src/modules/members` and related modules.
* Thin route handlers + validation.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Parent umbrella issue for team hierarchy, permission model, invite management, preferences, and auth extensions.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/31

linear_body:
## Objective

Deliver focused execution UX for individual contributors.

## Architecture Rules

* Task recommendation logic in service layer.
* Personal inbox data model in dedicated module.
* UI adheres to [DESIGN.md](<http://DESIGN.md>) and CSS Modules.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Parent umbrella issue for My Lens, focus mode, smart next task, personal inbox, keyboard navigation, recurring templates.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/32

linear_body:
## Objective

Add parent-child issue decomposition with aggregate progress metrics.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Data model supports parent-child issue links.
* Parent issues display completion rollup from child statuses.
* APIs and UI support create/read/update flows.

## Architecture

* Module files in `src/modules/tasks/` (`schema`, `repository`, `service`, `swagger`).
* Thin controllers in `app/api/tasks/**` via handler factories.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/33

linear_body:
## Objective

Provide reusable issue templates and workspace/project label taxonomy.

## Acceptance Criteria

* CRUD for issue templates (bug/feature/tech-debt/incident).
* Workspace and project label scopes for filtering.
* Template application when creating issues.

## Architecture

* New modules in `src/modules/issue-templates/` and label extensions.
* Thin routes in `app/api/issue-templates/**` and `app/api/labels/**`.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/34

linear_body:
## Objective

Track immutable issue-level history and workspace-wide audit mutations.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Capture who/what/when for issue field changes.
* Add workspace audit stream for compliance events.
* Query endpoints with pagination and filters.

## Architecture

* Module files in `src/modules/audit/`.
* Paginated handlers in `app/api/audit/**`.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/35

linear_body:
## Objective

Support blocked-by/blocking relationships with cascading overdue alerts.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Store issue dependency edges.
* Prevent invalid cycles where required.
* Trigger alerting when blockers become overdue.

## Architecture

* Task dependency logic in `src/modules/tasks/*.service.ts`.
* Route handlers in `app/api/tasks/**` via factories.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/36

linear_body:
## Objective

Introduce strategic planning layer: milestones, initiatives, and OKR linkage.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Milestone CRUD with project progress rollups.
* Initiative grouping across projects.
* OKR link model with auto-computed completion.

## Architecture

* Modules in `src/modules/milestones/`, `initiatives/`, `okrs/`.
* Thin routes in `app/api/milestones/**`, `initiatives/**`, `okrs/**`.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/37

linear_body:
## Objective

Compute project risk and scope creep signals from execution data.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Risk score 0-100 from overdue rate, velocity gap, blocker count.
* Scope creep alert when time exceeds 130% estimate or post-sprint task additions.
* Expose metrics in project APIs and views.

## Architecture

* Scoring logic in `src/modules/projects/*.service.ts` and analytics modules.
* Thin routes in `app/api/projects/**`.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/38

linear_body:
## Objective

Implement sprint backlog operations, rollover, burndown, and velocity.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Sprint backlog with drag-to-add issues.
* End-of-sprint rollover helper for incomplete issues.
* Burndown and velocity calculations exposed via API.

## Architecture

* `src/modules/sprints/` + analytics repositories.
* Thin routes in `app/api/sprints/**` using factory handlers.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/39

linear_body:
## Objective

Deliver full-text search, natural-language search, and saved filter views.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Search across title/description/comments with chained filters.
* Natural language query parsing for common issue intents.
* Save personal and shared views.

## Architecture

* Search services in `src/modules/search/`.
* Thin routes in `app/api/search/**` and `app/api/views/**`.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/40

linear_body:
## Objective

Add weekly timesheet workflow with manager approval and CSV/PDF export.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Weekly editable timesheet grid.
* Submit locks timesheet for edits.
* Manager approve/reject with reasons and audit trail.
* Export to CSV/PDF.

## Architecture

* Modules in `src/modules/timesheets/`.
* Thin routes in `app/api/timesheets/**`.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/41

linear_body:
## Objective

Implement one-click timer, manual entries, pomodoro sessions, and single-active-timer guard.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Start/stop timer on issue cards.
* Manual retroactive entry support.
* Pomodoro sessions auto-log time with break prompts.
* Prevent concurrent active timers.

## Architecture

* Modules in `src/modules/time-tracking/`.
* Thin routes in `app/api/time-entries/**`.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/42

## Objective

Deliver CTO dashboard and core analytics reports for delivery and capacity insights.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Dashboard metrics: velocity, blockers, workload, project health.
* Reports: cycle time, throughput, estimate accuracy, burnup, sprint comparison.
* APIs optimized for filterable time windows.

## Architecture

* `src/modules/analytics/` repositories/services/schemas/swagger.
* Thin routes in `app/api/analytics/**`.

## Objective

Deliver Slack, GitHub/GitLab, and webhook integrations plus close-approval gate workflow.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Integration events map to issue lifecycle updates.
* Branch/PR links sync to issues.
* Configurable approval-before-close workflow with auto-reopen on rejection.

## Architecture

* Integration modules under `src/modules/integrations/`.
* Thin routes in `app/api/integrations/**` and approvals endpoints.

## Objective

Deliver individual productivity suite including My Lens, focus mode, and recommendation engine.

## Acceptance Criteria

* My Lens prioritization view.
* Full-screen focus mode with task details/timer/worklog.
* Smart next-task suggestions using priority/sprint/dependency signals.

## Architecture

* Service-layer recommendation logic in `src/modules/tasks/` or dedicated focus module.
* UI in `components/views/**` with CSS Modules.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/46

linear_body:
## Objective

Complete personal productivity capability with private inbox, keyboard-first UX, and recurring task automation.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Private personal task inbox separated from team boards.
* Keyboard shortcuts for core actions.
* Recurring templates generate scheduled tasks.

## Architecture

* Modules for recurring templates and personal tasks.
* Thin routes in `app/api/personal-tasks/**` and `app/api/recurring/**`.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/48
gh_body:
## Objective

Complete personal productivity capability with private inbox, keyboard-first UX, and recurring task automation.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Private personal task inbox separated from team boards.
* Keyboard shortcuts for core actions.
* Recurring templates generate scheduled tasks.

## Architecture

* Modules for recurring templates and personal tasks.
* Thin routes in `app/api/personal-tasks/**` and `app/api/recurring/**`.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/48
Linear Issue: https://linear.app/trial-0/issue/TRI-52/implement-personal-inbox-keyboard-shortcuts-and-recurring-templates

Depends on:
- TRI-36: https://linear.app/trial-0/issue/TRI-36/plan-phase-17-focus-and-personal-productivity

linear_body:
## Objective

Implement Workspace -> Teams -> Projects -> Issues hierarchy and enforce role-based permissions.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Team model and membership hierarchy support.
* Fine-grained Owner/Admin/Member/Viewer permissions.
* Service-layer authorization checks for all protected operations.

## Architecture

* Modules in `src/modules/members/`, `src/modules/teams/`, related services.
* Thin routes in `app/api/teams/**`, `app/api/members/**`.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/49

linear_body:
## Objective

Support customizable status columns per team and robust invite lifecycle controls.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Team-specific workflow states configurable through API/UI.
* Invite via email/link with role assignment and revocation.
* Preference settings include theme, notifications, timezone, working hours.

## Architecture

* Modules in `src/modules/workflows/`, `invites/`, `members/`.
* Thin routes in `app/api/workflows/**`, `app/api/invites/**`, `app/api/preferences/**`.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/prabuddha03/Arbitask/issues/50
